Subject: NCM-P-2025-02-26 Home in Five Platinum
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-02-26 17:37:05-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

 

eHousing has announced the launch of the Home in Five Platinum program fund allocation for 2025.  See their announcement below for details:

 

$100,000,000 of Home in 5 Platinum Program funds will be available tomorrow, February 27th, at a mortgage rate of 5.70%, coupled with down payment assistance of 4%!

 

Click here to view the Home in 5 Platinum web page on the eHousingPlus web site <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJuQm0JajCI4I4zNJXVJXtG1IgyDN41ZO5CtBUfCCKtXsHV1VfnZbOfiT88Pl38vDLb7CLtMuDEOpdUALBOQkmQ4n5Ygqma1WpuEDFCa4U1tRizFYTIJVUWhziQAFR_CkTiChVbAcopfV&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTuYzCft5A$> 

 

 

Where can I find the rate for the Home in 5 Platinum Program? Reservation/Rate Locks are available Monday - Friday 9:00AM - 7:00PM MT excluding holidays. 

Click here to view the rate offering. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJuQm0JajCI4Id1imKHgoM2npwclWH07fnMHG8fkQ0_QVXSGebU2LS2XAyi3onLcLTCZ3ulNo8S1rQZ_EwzT83V2sPPjDJCq1FOag5_O9RQga3TLfO_98MiQkX6G34WU4kzgj4hjgInRx_TafM-5E5pN2HTrUfDeacg==&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTvT1BuNGw$> 

 

How do I receive user credentials for the eHPortal? If you had user access with the 2024 Home in 5 Platinum Program you will continue to have access. Log-in to the eHPortal <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJrkYFex6q81sSGyG8iSo9leckINInMex3en--4L6bSgaPFIJakwKACldmQ1-P918eDF9SmrMV4jyZnHGEOEaiQVONlhursC2UIEo4I31Ll21o9EQkdgykxQRJMuUHIRE0A==&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTtqO_PGIg$>  to make a reservation in the Home in 5 Platinum Program. 

 

Who do I contact if my user credentials are not working? Please email useraccess@ehpuniversity.com <mailto:useraccess@ehpuniversity.com>  with the subject line: Home in 5 Platinum User Access.

 

Where can I find income calculation guidance? Pages 22 - 26 of the Program Guidelines found on the Home in 5 Platinum web page <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJuQm0JajCI4I4zNJXVJXtG1IgyDN41ZO5CtBUfCCKtXsHV1VfnZbOfiT88Pl38vDLb7CLtMuDEOpdUALBOQkmQ4n5Ygqma1WpuEDFCa4U1tRizFYTIJVUWhziQAFR_CkTiChVbAcopfV&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTuYzCft5A$>  > click on the Owl Program Administration Guidelines.

 

Where can I find the income and purchase price limits? Program Highlights web page. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJuQm0JajCI4Id1imKHgoM2npwclWH07fnMHG8fkQ0_QVXSGebU2LS2XAyi3onLcLTCZ3ulNo8S1rQZ_EwzT83V2sPPjDJCq1FOag5_O9RQga3TLfO_98MiQkX6G34WU4kzgj4hjgInRx_TafM-5E5pN2HTrUfDeacg==&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTvT1BuNGw$>  > click on the 2025A Bond Guide > pages 9 and 10.

 

How do I disclose the Second Mortgage? Since the initial training there has been a change. The second mortgage may be disclosed one of two ways:

1.     Initial and final LE and CD provided by the lender or title company (separate from the first mortgage LE and CD - the ALTA is not acceptable), OR

2.     Second Loan Disclosure form signed at closing 

 

I have a colleague that needs training, how can they attend training? eHPUniversity provides training on-demand. Click on this link to register. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJoYOZf_cnnGbB33SxXMmD3fPIIhyZeGWZTC50C7amBUhLRKykITxPNLaDRdetV-eiLktDFHgEBveqyVo5WlEwr2ELr1r3pKNwdKEI_iL49ft&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTswOXsJPQ$>  On-Demand will be available again on 03/03/25. 

 

I don't know how to reserve funds or print forms in eHousingPlus, is there additional guidance or training? Yes, click on this link. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h8EhRL6j8r66FeEqGvtCuwign9cA6YrYdCnkru_YulhuBwEripWeJv_ALezacnbgDmcAdv1-H1bLrxUBxCweEQcj-UQLVR28QqPp5KrdhFDoNqaNW9aErg_xO3u5_MkWacCRgfAQLTb2eeosXzZ_w86jC77GIvpyykfpu3PXjm_EAsREdyxkJKrLXu9obWaA&c=YpQxX9c-tC-mCqD4k2ot3svtF1phuNWBh630Fwqz_RDzUYzmD5EKqg==&ch=AmO7Sq8VbzwLZQD8g7dK4fbwNXRoJ3zhpM3rOVemb7U8s2w_YVdvKw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WCpTznoqxfKWFHJO98n6W5XQZwrS_2kOGdGPLMG2wC1UKtgczj96hEY4eNJ4KUsf83La_36c0BhuOOYKkTsIVaQhYg$> 

Then, click on the eHP FrontPorch logo. Log in with your user credentials.

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
